'''Karreio''' was the daughter of an important [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] and the fiancée of [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]]. She was a firm believer in the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. Madine defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] without telling Karreio, fearing that any knowledge she possessed could put her life in danger. Karreio died during the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]].
